Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: You GM fans are in for a real treat as the guys transform a 1985 Buick Regal grandma car.
Video.title: Street Regal

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel visit the powder room to freshen up the frame on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 3

Video.summary: We make repairs on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, showing you how to remove rust and pull dents.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 4

Video.summary: A fresh coat of paint helps transform our Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine!
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 5

Video.summary: A marriage made in heaven – Our Fat Stack Caprice gets reunited with our updated chassis.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 6

Video.summary: Chrome is where the heart is – Tommy and Joel update the bright work on their ‘71 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 7

Video.summary: We begin to piece our ‘71 Caprice Fat Stack back together, installing glass, hood, and body panels.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 8

Video.summary: We install the cooling system on our ’71 Caprice and then put the pedal to the metal.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 9

Video.summary: We restore the heater box on Fat Stack, and install air conditioning components to make it cool.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Image.alt: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Video.summary: The guys finalize Fat Stack’s transformation from automatic to manual.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 11

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel cut a rug and freshen up Fat Stack’s interior to match the flashy exterior.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 12

Video.summary: The finish line is in sight for Fat Stack with finishing touches and a one-of-a-kind grille.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 13

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: We’re transforming a beater ‘74 Bronco into a head-turning beach cruiser.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: A real Cinderella story, our ’69 Charger needs a lot of work to make it to the ball.
Video.title: 1969 Hard Charger Hellcat

Video.summary: Can you really build the ultimate off-road vehicle that’s unbreakable? Challenge accepted.
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: Our 1969 Project Spartan Jeep gets custom exhaust, rear suspension, and body mounts.
Video.title: Rear Suspension Throwdown
